title: Group By Reduce By Key Scaffold

problem.summary: Group sorted or unsorted key/value pairs and reduce values per key while exposing skew, preprocessing, and temporary-storage costs.
constraints: Template-only; separate sorted-input reduce_by_key from sort-plus-reduce pipelines
Record skew, group-size histogram, and stable output policy
Custom atomics must document conflict and determinism behavior

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or strongest-library oracle where applicable; compare outputs before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as wave 2. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
